evals.name: trigger-login-form
evals.prompt: Create a login form with email and password fields, including validation and a submit button.

assertions.text: Includes validation rules (required, email format) returning t() i18n keys
Uses v-text-field relying on project defaults (outlined, comfortable, rounded)

evals.name: trigger-select-input
evals.prompt: Add a dropdown to select a user role from Admin, Editor, Viewer with object items.

assertions.text: Uses v-select with :items and item-title / item-value

evals.name: negative-data-table
evals.prompt: Build an admin users table with server-side pagination and sortable columns.

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-forms; routes to vuetify-data instead
